## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem does this solve? Link to related issues with `Closes #123`.

## How

Key implementation details — what approach you took and any trade-offs.

## Testing

- [ ] Existing tests pass (`pytest tests/ -v -s`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Linting passes (`ruff check .`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
